notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez steals (5) 3rd base. Josh Naylor steals (9) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Rob Refsnyder pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rob Refsnyder grounds into a force out, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to second baseman Sung-Mun Song. Cole Young out at 2nd.
